body.title: Migrate utility_closet/* logging to self.log + get_logger pattern
body.result: 16 files migrated. utility_closet/* now routes through AgentBase factory (get_logger). Bypass: 51→1 (agent_base bootstrap exempt), Legacy: 42→0. Audit refined with assignment-aware classification. 5 new tests + 4119 regression pass. Commit ac85d393. Unblocks T-logging-migrate-cognition and T-logging-migrate-lab-claudecode.
body.description:
Replace logging.getLogger bypass + _log/logger legacy pattern with self.log (when in inheriting class) or get_logger(__name__) (module-level) across lab/utility_closet/. Establishes the migration pattern that T-logging-migrate-cognition will follow.

Counts from 2026-04-29 audit (lab/claudecode/reports/logging_audit_20260429-211639.md):
- db_proxy.py: 34 logging.getLogger sites
- utility_closet_server.py: 36 _log sites (lab/claudecode but pulled here for shape)
- machine_manager.py: 14 _log + 1 logging.getLogger
- comms.py: 9 _log + 1 logging.getLogger
- transports/*.py: ~12 sites across 4 files
- agent_base.py: 3 logging.getLogger (likely keep — this IS the base)

**Affected files:** lab/utility_closet/{db_proxy,comms,machine_manager,db_shelf,failover,matter_shelf,metrics_store,rack,registry,system_proxy}.py + lab/utility_closet/transports/*.py.
**Design rules:** inherit-base-class palace rule + the AgentBase.log property contract.
**Scope boundary:** in scope: callsite mechanical migration. Out of scope: refactoring what's logged.
**Test plan:** existing tests must pass after migration. Re-run audit_logging.py to confirm bypass/legacy counts dropped. Spot-check log emission via brief Igor smoke run.
